feat: add automated BoondManager API monitoring system

Implements a comprehensive weekly monitoring system that:
- Scrapes BoondManager API documentation (https://doc.boondmanager.com/api-externe/raml-build/)
- Detects changes (additions, removals, modifications)
- Automatically creates GitHub issues with detailed reports
- Commits updated snapshots to track API evolution over time

## New Files

### Workflows (GitHub Actions)
- `.github/workflows/api-monitor.yml` — Main monitoring workflow (cron: Mon 9am UTC)
- `.github/workflows/api-monitor.test.yml` — Test workflow (manual trigger only)

### Documentation
- `.github/API_MONITORING.md` — Complete system documentation
- `.github/README.md` — GitHub workflows overview
- `MONITORING_SETUP_SUMMARY.md` — Installation & deployment guide

### Automation
- `scripts/test-api-monitor.cjs` — Local testing script (CommonJS)
- `.github/api-snapshot.json` — Initial snapshot baseline
- `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/api-update.yml` — Structured issue template

## Modified Files
- `package.json` — Added `api:monitor:test` and `api:monitor:save` scripts
- `CLAUDE.md` — Documented API monitoring in CI/CD section
- `.gitignore` — Excluded workflow artifacts (changes.json, issue-body.md)

## Features

✅ **Automatic Detection**: Weekly cron job (Monday 9am UTC)
✅ **Smart Comparison**: Detects additions, removals, and modifications
✅ **GitHub Issues**: Auto-created with labels (enhancement, api-update, automated)
✅ **Version Control**: Snapshots committed to Git for audit trail
✅ **Local Testing**: `npm run api:monitor:test` for dry-runs
✅ **Comprehensive Docs**: Full troubleshooting and configuration guides
✅ **Artifacts**: 90-day retention for change history

## Usage

### Automatic (Recommended)
Workflow runs every Monday at 9am UTC. No action required.

### Manual Trigger
GitHub Actions → "Monitor BoondManager API Changes" → "Run workflow"

### Local Testing
```bash
npm run api:monitor:test        # Read-only test
npm run api:monitor:save        # Test + save snapshot
```

## Issue Format

When changes are detected, auto-creates issue with:
- Summary of additions/removals/modifications
- Checklist of recommended actions (update schemas, tools, tests, docs)
- Priority and impact assessment fields
- Direct links to BoondManager documentation

## Configuration

Adjust cron schedule in `.github/workflows/api-monitor.yml`:
```yaml
schedule:
  - cron: '0 9 * * 1'  # minute hour day month weekday
```

## Notes

- First run creates baseline snapshot (no issue)
- Subsequent runs compare against previous snapshot
- User-Agent headers prevent bot blocking
- Local tests may fail (403) while GitHub Actions succeed (different IPs)
- Workflow commits use `[skip ci]` to avoid CI loops

## References

- BoondManager API Docs: https://doc.boondmanager.com/api-externe/raml-build/
- GitHub Blog: https://github.github.com/gh-aw/blog/2026-01-13-meet-the-workflows-testing-validation/
